strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across software, hardware, and infrastructure with consistent technical depth and adaptability across languages and domains.
Proven track record in building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, directly aligning with AI strategy and platform development responsibilities.

Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective — an open-source, Kubernetes-deployable AI-adjacent geospatial platform used by real-world NGOs — showcasing product ownership and systems thinking.
concerns: No explicit mention of a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, though practical AI experience is evident.
Limited public documentation of AI-powered products or platforms with measurable impact beyond internal tooling.
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may pose minor communication challenges in a Berlin-based role with cross-border stakeholders.
response.justification: Bogdan’s 15+ years of deep, hands-on engineering across cloud-native systems, AI-agent tooling, and scalable infrastructure — combined with his entrepreneurial creation of a widely adopted open-source geospatial platform — strongly align with the role’s mandate to drive AI strategy through technical innovation and cross-team leadership, making him a compelling fit despite lacking a formal AI advanced degree.
